_comment: Phase 0b conformance fixture — framing recipe web_page. Alternate framing for experiences that don't suit a broadcast format (reference material, galleries, document-heavy). Resolves page_shell:'web_page', show_ident:'none', opening:'straight', closing:'abrupt'. Engine renders all items in-flow as scrollable cards with no bumper / cold-open / chyrons / sign-off. Tests resolveFraming() against web_page recipe definition + the alternate render path.
name: Framing — Web Page
description: Validates HWES v1 framing system with web_page recipe (in-flow alternate to broadcast).

content_metadata.body: First reference paragraph for the web-page render.
